meaning: n.(传说中) 亚瑟王的神剑
examples: Think of Arthur, Merlin, and Excalibur.
Fortune Select Excalibur is ideal for leisure and business travelers alike.
The objective Excalibur has a 40-km (24.8 miles) range that demonstrates better than 10 meter-(32.8 feet) accuracy.
The exterior of Excalibur Hotel and Casino looks like the fictional city of Duloc from Shrek.
Just in Vegas, MGM Mirage owns Mandalay Bay, MGM Grand, Skylofts, Bellagio, Mirage, New York New York, Excalibur, Golden Nugget, Monte Carlo, Vdara, and Aria.
